# adore documentation

> adore (adore.rest) is a free, all-in-one Discord bot. Documentation lives at wiki.adore.rest. Premium plans: https://adore.rest/premium

## Premium plans

- [Premium plans](https://wiki.adore.rest/overview/premium): Personal Premium ($5/mo), Server Premium ($15/mo), and Private Instance ($30 one-time or $10/mo).
- **Payment methods:** PayPal, Bank Transfer, Bitcoin / Ethereum / Litecoin.
- [Live pricing](https://adore.rest/premium): `#pricing` - `#personal-premium`, `#private-instance`, `#server-premium`
- [Customization](https://wiki.adore.rest/overview/customization): Custom bot avatar, banner, bio and nickname per server.

## Key pages

- [Introduction](https://wiki.adore.rest/overview/introduction): What adore is and how to get started.
- [Setup](https://wiki.adore.rest/configuration/setup): Initial server configuration.
- [Security overview](https://wiki.adore.rest/security/overview): Anti-nuke, anti-raid and moderation.
- [Tickets](https://wiki.adore.rest/configuration/tickets/overview): Ticket system setup.
- [Commands on adore.rest](https://adore.rest/commands): Full command list on the main website.
- [Last.fm](https://wiki.adore.rest/integrations/lastfm): Listening commands, caching, and custom NP embed variables.
- [Spotify](https://wiki.adore.rest/integrations/spotify): Spotify playback and search.
- [Scripting](https://wiki.adore.rest/resources/scripting/embeds): Embed syntax, [containers](https://wiki.adore.rest/resources/scripting/containers), and [variables](https://wiki.adore.rest/resources/scripting/variables).

## Get started

- [Add adore to Discord](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=1510215071559847946&permissions=8&integration_type=0&scope=bot)
- [Support server](https://discord.gg/q3e53k4qKQ)
- [adore.rest](https://adore.rest)
